title: Knowledge Graph JSON-LD view (derived)
description: Linked-data (JSON-LD) view of the knowledge graph: the same nodes and edges as graph/dist/graph.json, wrapped with a JSON-LD @context, node @types, and reified edges. Lossless, additive sibling of the canonical graph.json. Regenerated by CI from the dist. Do not edit by hand.

@context.description: The JSON-LD context, inlined from graph/context.jsonld (or a reference to it). Maps node-id prefixes, node/edge type terms, and field terms to IRIs.

_schema_version.description: The graph.json schema generation this view derives from, carried through from graph/dist/graph.json so the derived view is self-describing.

_meta.description: Auto-generation provenance marker. Signals that this file is derived, do not edit by hand.

examples.do_not_edit: Regenerated by CI from the dist; edit the source substrate, not this file.

@graph.description: Flat JSON-LD node set: every graph node (typed @id + @type) followed by every graph edge, reified as its own object with edgeType/source/target.

@id.description: Namespaced node IRI-compatible identifier: <prefix>:<slug>, matching the id shape of graph.json nodes.

edgeType.description: Edge type discriminator, matching the type field of the corresponding graph.json edge (e.g. in_category, a11y_ref, motion_ref, foundations_ref, related, narrower).
